title: CPI(M) warns Vijay in Tamil Nadu: ‘Will rethink support if AIADMK joins Govt,’ says P Shanmugam
description: Tamil Nadu CPI(M) Secretary P Shanmugam has reiterated that the Left parties would reconsider their support to the TVK government if the AIADMK joins the Tamil Nadu Cabinet, while commenting on VCK's inclusion in the cabinet.
